name: dedup_same_objective_via_two_tiers
description: Dedup case: body text contains BOTH 'AC-2' and 'CCI-000015'. Tier 2 fires first (CCI->Objective lookup), adds the row at conf 0.95. Tier 3 then finds the same Objective via control AC-2; _add() returns early because the obj_id is already in _existing_pairs. CRITICAL behavior pinned: the row is NOT duplicated (tag_count=1) but BOTH tier hit counters increment (cci_hits=1 AND control_id_hits=1) because the counter += 1 lives in the outer loop AFTER _add returns. The first-tier-wins rule means the persisted tag carries the 0.95 confidence, not 0.5. Filename is scan.ckl so the kind-gate (added 2026-06-07) lets the Tier 2 text-scrape fire — under policy.pdf only Tier 3 would fire and this dedup invariant wouldn't be exercised.

evidence.text: This AC-2 STIG checklist implements CCI-000015 directly.
